content.text: Task list has been updated with 5 item(s).

task_list.title: Phase 0 — Multi-tenancy gate
task_list.notes: Verify and install multi-tenancy if not already present.

task_list.title: Phase A — Generate feature models
task_list.notes: Generate models from blueprints, edit model files, register resources, and run migrations.

task_list.title: Phase B — Implement Extras
task_list.notes: Implement custom scopes, callbacks, policies, and seed data.

task_list.title: Phase C — Verify
task_list.notes: Verify multi-tenant runtime, run API smoke tests, and perform AC sweep.

task_list.title: Phase D — Write tests for the backend
task_list.notes: Write unit and integration tests, run tests, and fix any failures.
